attacking_style: Favors attacking on the steepest gradient sections of climbs, showing mature tactical awareness for his age. Appears comfortable taking leadership role on difficult terrain.
team_tactics: Limited data on team support structure, but appears to operate as a protected rider given his attacks as a leader on key climbs.
terrain_preference: Steepest gradient sections of climbs are where he shows strongest form and tactical aggression. Flat, technical finales appear less suited to his strengths.
vulnerability: Susceptible to splits in flat, technical finales and late-race positioning errors. Lost overall podium at UAE Tour due to final stage positioning mistake despite strong climbing throughout the week.
key_patterns: Attacks on steepest climb gradients as designated leader (2 observations)
Late-race concentration or positioning lapses in technical scenarios (2 observations)
Strong climbing form relative to age and experience level (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: Only 2020 data available with conflicting signals - strong climbing but critical positioning error. Insufficient recent data.
